title: Amduat
description: The ancient Egyptian 'Book of What Is in the Duat' — a funerary text describing the sun god Re's nocturnal journey through 12 hours of the underworld, which the soul travels alongside. Key moments include the waters of Wernes, the desert of Rosetau, the midnight union of Re and Osiris (Hour 6), and rebirth through the World-Encircler Serpent (Hour 12).
